home.title: Is this website safe?
home.subtitle: Enter any website URL to get an instant security and trust assessment
home.disclaimer: This scan checks general security indicators only. No penetration testing or deep scans are performed.

browse.label: Browsing
browse.suitable: The site uses an encrypted connection and shows no clear risk indicators.
browse.caution: You can browse, but avoid entering any important data until the indicators improve.
browse.not_recommended: We advise against browsing this site if you plan to click links or open files from it.

account.label: Create Account
account.suitable: You can create an account, but use a different password from your important accounts.
account.caution: Creating an account is possible, but use a secondary email and a unique password.
account.not_recommended: We do not recommend creating an account on this site at this time.

payment.label: Payment
payment.suitable: No clear risk indicators, but always verify the site name before entering payment details.
payment.caution: Avoid paying unless you fully trust the organization behind this site.
payment.not_recommended: We do not recommend entering payment details on this site at this time.

personal_data.label: Personal Data
personal_data.suitable: Share only what is necessary — avoid sending sensitive information without a clear reason.
personal_data.caution: Minimize what you share and avoid providing sensitive information.
personal_data.not_recommended: We do not recommend entering personal data on this site at this time.

fix_plan.title: Fix Plan
fix_plan.no_issues: No issues found in this scan. Review the security checks below for details.

no_https.title: HTTPS not detected
no_https.why: The connection between the browser and server is unencrypted. Visitors may see security warnings in their browser, and data in transit is not protected.
no_https.how: Enable an SSL certificate via your hosting provider and redirect all HTTP traffic to HTTPS. Consider using Let's Encrypt if your host supports it.
no_https.developer_text:
[CRITICAL] Enable HTTPS (SSL) on the server.
Redirect all HTTP traffic to HTTPS (301 redirect).
Consider Let's Encrypt for a free certificate.
Verify with your developer before deploying.

ssl_invalid.title: SSL certificate is invalid
ssl_invalid.why: The site's SSL certificate could not be verified. Browsers may block visitors with a security error, which can significantly reduce trust.
ssl_invalid.how: Renew or reinstall the SSL certificate from your hosting provider. Ensure the certificate matches the domain name and has not expired.
ssl_invalid.developer_text:
[CRITICAL] SSL certificate is invalid or could not be verified.
Renew the certificate from your hosting provider.
Ensure the certificate matches the correct domain.
Test using: openssl s_client -connect yourdomain.com:443

ssl_expiry_soon.title: SSL certificate expires soon
ssl_expiry_soon.why: The SSL certificate is approaching its expiry date. Once it expires, visitors will see security warnings and the site may become inaccessible.
ssl_expiry_soon.how: Renew the SSL certificate before it expires. If using Let's Encrypt, set up automatic renewal. Contact your hosting provider if renewal is manual.
ssl_expiry_soon.developer_text:
[HIGH] SSL certificate expires soon.
Renew the certificate immediately to avoid browser warnings.
If using Let's Encrypt, enable auto-renewal (certbot renew --dry-run).
Set a calendar reminder for future renewals.

no_hsts.title: HSTS header not configured
no_hsts.why: Without HSTS (HTTP Strict Transport Security), browsers may allow unencrypted connections even when HTTPS is available. This may reduce protection against certain network-level attacks.
no_hsts.how: Add the Strict-Transport-Security header to your server configuration. Example: Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains. Consult your developer or hosting documentation for the correct method.
no_hsts.developer_text:
[MEDIUM] HSTS header is missing.
Add to server config:
Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains
For Apache: add to .htaccess or httpd.conf
For Nginx: add to server block
Test at: https://hstspreload.org

weak_headers.title: Security headers are incomplete
weak_headers.why: One or more recommended security headers are missing. These headers help browsers protect users from common web vulnerabilities such as content injection and clickjacking.
weak_headers.how: Review which headers are missing and add them to your server or CDN configuration. Common headers to check: Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy. Consult your developer for the correct values.
weak_headers.developer_text:
[MEDIUM] One or more security headers are missing.
Check and add the following where applicable:
- Content-Security-Policy
- X-Frame-Options: DENY
- X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
- Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
- Permissions-Policy
Test at: https://securityheaders.com

bad_reputation.title: Domain flagged in reputation check
bad_reputation.why: This domain appeared in one or more reputation sources that track suspicious or potentially harmful sites. This may affect user trust and deliverability of emails from this domain.
bad_reputation.how: Check the domain against reputation services to understand why it was flagged. If the flag is incorrect, follow the dispute process for the relevant service. If the flag appears valid, review recent changes to the site and address the underlying cause before requesting a review.
bad_reputation.developer_text:
[WARNING] Domain has a negative reputation flag.
Review why the site was flagged, resolve the underlying issue, check for unwanted changes, and request a reputation review from the relevant providers.

errors.invalid_url: The entered URL is invalid. Please check the format.
errors.rate_limit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.timeout: Scan timed out. The site may be slow or unavailable.
errors.try_again: An error occurred. Please try again.

roadmap.headline: Where are we now?
roadmap.intro: The goal of this app is not just to display technical errors, but to help users make decisions, help site owners fix issues, and then track improvement over time.
roadmap.note_estimates: These percentages are planning estimates, not automated measurements.
roadmap.where_now_value: Public Trust Check is secured via the Safe Scan Runner.
roadmap.next_step_value: Move Owner Scan to the Safe Scan Runner.
roadmap.after_next_value: Improve product experience: results page, report, fix plan, copy instructions, Before/After view.

visitor_path.title: Visitor Flow
flow: Know if the site is safe for browsing, payment, or sharing personal data
done: Safe Scan Runner for public requests
remaining: Clear decision: browse / account / payment / personal data

owner_path.title: Site Owner Flow
flow: Export a task for your developer
remaining: Move Owner Scan to Safe Scan Runner

admin_path.title: Admin Flow
flow: Activate deeper scan only after authorization
remaining: No deep scan without Authorization Record
